title: Leclerc handed staggering punishment as Verstappen survives early scare
summary:
Charles Leclerc received a massive post-race punishment after a dramatic final lap in the Miami Grand Prix, while Kimi Antonelli wrote yet more F1 history with victory at the Miami International Autodrome.

There was drama from the very beginning in Miami, although it was dry despite major fears of weather-related disruption. Max Verstappen survived an early scare after spinning at the second corner, ending his hopes of victory.

Join RacingNews365's Ian Parkes and Nick Golding as they dissect a chaotic Miami GP!

Mercedes Formula 1 CEO and team principal Toto Wolff has insisted that it is important not to get carried away with Kimi Antonelli's success.

Ferrari Formula 1 driver Charles Leclerc has placed the blame on himself after a late spin in the Miami Grand Prix cost him a podium finish.

Red Bull's Max Verstappen, Ferrari driver Charles Leclerc and Mercedes man George Russell have all been summoned to the stewards at the end of Formula 1's Miami Grand Prix.
Mercedes' Kimi Antonelli defeated McLaren's Lando Norris to take his third consecutive grand prix win, expanding his championship lead on Russell to 20 points.

title: FIA president certain V8 engines to return to F1 by 2031
summary:
FIA president Mohammed Ben Sulayem has promised to end the ongoing 13-year hiatus of V8 power units from Formula 1 by 2031 at the latest.
The V8 was ditched for a V6 turbo-hybrid in 2014 and F1 has now entered its third regulation cycle since the electrified power units were introduced.

summary:
Isack Hadjar has been officially disqualified from qualifying for this weekend’s Miami Grand Prix after his Red Bull fell foul of the Formula 1 technical regulations.
